overview.value: Pothos is a fast-growing trailing plant with heart-shaped leaves. It is one of the easiest indoor plants for beginners and tolerates a wide range of rooms.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"Pothos","overview":"Pothos is a fast-growing trailing plant with heart-shaped leaves. It is one of the easiest indoor plants for beginners and tolerates a wide range of rooms.","tips":"Trim long vines to encourage fuller growth and root cuttings in water."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"绿萝","overview":"绿萝是一种生长很快的垂吊植物，叶片呈心形。它非常适合新手，能适应多种室内光照和养护条件。","tips":"定期修剪过长藤蔓可以让株型更丰满，剪下的枝条也能水培生根。"}}
